# Repository Instructions

Read these files before making ANY change:

.playbook/01_AI_CONSTITUTION.md
.playbook/02_PROJECT_MEMORY.md
.playbook/03_ARCHITECTURE.md
.playbook/09_DATA_MODEL.md
.playbook/19_CURRENT_SPRINT.md

Never delete content during refactoring.
Preserve backwards compatibility.
Implement only the requested task.
Prefer reusable components.
Use Vanilla JS + Tailwind CSS.
Keep data separate from UI.
